_comment: App Store screenshot copy keys. Spec source of truth: docs/marketing/screenshot-spec.md. EN copy is the picked top candidate from Part B of that spec. TR / tl-PH / id columns to be filled by narrative-designer follow-up dispatch; PH and ID may fall back to EN per cut-list #3 in GAME.md. Naming convention mirrors the existing 89-key table in en.json (snake_case). These keys are NOT loaded at runtime — they are read by the Canva/Figma overlay composition dispatch.

screenshot_1_subhead.en: An 8-minute roguelite with a smile on every frame.

screenshot_2_subhead.en: Auto-attack, evolve, and watch a build come alive.

screenshot_3_subhead.en: Tortoise tanks. Fox crits. Owl scales. Pick your style.

screenshot_4_subhead.en: Meadow, beach, forest, cavern, snow — each plays different.

screenshot_5_subhead.en: Three offers, six builds, infinite runs.
